long_form.title: How Global Alcohol Consumption Tastes Shifted: Beer, Wine, & Spirits (1900-2022)
long_form.description: Dive into over a century of global alcohol consumption, visualizing the epic battle between beer, wine, and spirits for dominance in our glasses. This video reveals dramatic shifts in drinking habits, reflecting profound cultural changes, industrial innovations, and historical events across the globe. Witness how preferences evolved from 1900 to 2022, shaping the way we drink today. Data source: Our World in Data.

short.title: US Alcohol Consumption Skyrocketed 4134% In Just 20 Years! #Shorts
short.description: From 1928 to 1948, global alcohol consumption underwent a radical transformation. Witness how the United States saw a staggering 4134% growth in consumption during this intense 20-year period, alongside other significant country shifts.
